description: A pack-kind entry carrying hold_hours: 24 is republished with security_flagged: true, authenticated by nothing beyond the same routine targets-role signature already covering the rest of the entry -- for pack/content-package kind this bare publisher-signed flag must not zero the hold. Refused; the hold remains in force until either (a) a matching artifact-class revocation naming the exact superseded (pack_id, prior version), signed by the delegated revocation role (a key distinct from the publish key), or (b) a manual-approval countersignature under an owner-role or revocation-role key not derivable from the publish key, is additionally present. A second signature made under the same publish key would NOT satisfy the bar (separation of duties is of key/role, not tool or process).
